mechanism_narrative: A sustained decrease in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that lowers discount rates, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.3pp monthly increase in unemployment rate signals weakening labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings expectations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.3pp.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO/HOUST and SPX returns falls below 0.05 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles characterized by FEDFUNDS above 4.5% and rising CPIAUCSL create inflationary pressures that suppress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL > 3%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) above 100k in a month signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are not significantly positive when PAYEMS exceeds 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production (INDPRO) indicates weakening supply-side capacity utilization, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as corporate profits decline.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO falls > 1.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and retail sales (RSAFS) reflects strong aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: Rank IC between GDPC1/RSAFS and SPX returns falls below 0.05 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 4.5% signals tight labor market conditions that increase wage pressures and corporate costs, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE < 4.5%.
